title: schedonorus × fleischeri
intro: Schedonorus × fleischeri, also known as timothy grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory agent, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Schedonorus × fleischeri include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting digestive well-being. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be consumed as a dietary supplement in capsule or powder form, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
